ai.title: Just type one sentence
ai.desc: Upload brand assets, AI analyzes what marketing materials you need and generates them automatically.

allInOne.title: All marketing in one place
allInOne.desc: Landing Pages, Reels, social posting, KOL matching, analytics — manage all marketing needs in one platform.

factory.title: AI Factory
factory.desc: Upload brand assets → AI analyzes your product → Strategist plans → Architect designs → Factory generates → Supervisor inspects. Fully automated, 30-minute turnaround.

payg.title: Pay as you go
payg.desc: $1 USD = 30 pts, no monthly subscription. Landing Pages ~75-250 pts, Reels ~50-150 pts, social posts 5-10 pts.

finalCta.subtitle: Start today — do with one sentence what used to require an entire marketing team.

welcome.subtitle: Complete these 4 steps to unlock all AI marketing capabilities

step1.title: Install SaleCraft Plugin
step1.desc: Add this plugin URL to your AI platform's MCP settings to access all marketing tools.
step1.command: I'd like to use this plugin to ask for advice on how to market my product

step2.title: Connect Meta Account
step2.desc: Link your Facebook / Instagram account to let AI auto-publish posts, stories, and Reels. Both personal and professional accounts are supported.

step3.title: Connect Google Account
step3.desc: Link your Google account to access Google Drive content. AI can directly read your brand materials and documents. If you signed up with Google, this step is already done.

step4.title: Top Up Points
step4.desc: $1 USD = 30 pts. After topping up, you can use Landing Page generation, Reels, social publishing, and all other features.
step4.costRef: Landing Page ≈ 75–250 pts · Reels ≈ 50–150 pts · Social ≈ 5–10 pts

bottom.note: After setup, return to Claude Code to start your first marketing project
